title: Split Array with Same Average
hints: Calculate the total sum and length of nums. If a subset of size k has the same average, its sum must be exactly k * total_sum / n.
Check if total_sum * k is divisible by n for any valid subset size k. This ensures the target subset sum is an integer.
Use dynamic programming or memoized recursion to find if a subset of size k exists with the calculated target sum.
